mapper.select: SELECT id, name, maker, category, note, is_deleted, created_at FROM equipment WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, maker, category, note, is_deleted, created_at FROM equipment WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY category, name

SELECT id, name, maker, category, note, is_deleted, created_at FROM equipment
ORDER BY category, name LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND note IS NOT NULL AND note != '' AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND category = #{category}

SELECT DISTINCT e.id, e.name, e.maker, e.category, e.note AS remark FROM equipment e INNER JOIN residence_items ri ON ri.equipment_id = e.id INNER JOIN residences res ON res.id = ri.residence_id AND res.status = 'active' INNER JOIN rooms r ON r.id = res.room_id AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY e.category, e.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment (name, maker, category, note, is_deleted, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{maker}, #{category}, #{remark}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
